positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a majestic Bengal tiger walking through a dense, tropical jungle. The tiger is rendered with strong black lines and vibrant orange and black color blocking, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes. The background foliage should be composed of simplified, repeating geometric patterns (like stylized leaves and vines) that create a rhythm, maintaining high contrast against the central figure. Composition should be central and symmetrical, suitable for an apparel chest print. Use a clean, vector art aesthetic with a limited, high-contrast color palette (burnt orange, deep jungle green, ivory white, and black). Highly detailed, crisp lines, flat design principles, illustrative.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, low detail, signature, logo, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, photorealistic, ugly, noisy
